overall.description: A cinematic gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a futuristic sports car driving through Night City's neon-lit downtown district at night. The vehicle navigates through covered underpasses with red structural beams, stops at a major intersection beneath the Orbital Air building, and continues through dense commercial streets lined with holographic billboards and elevated highways.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered arterial roadway with red structural beams

agents.ego_description: driving steadily through covered urban roadway beneath red structural beams and overpasses

entered.detail: concrete and steel overpass structure with red painted beams creating a tunnel-like effect
large illuminated advertisement featuring a figure with purple and yellow coloring
white rectangular sign with 'COLA' text in black letters
blue and red illuminated sign with 'CHRO' visible text
exposed red steel framework supporting the overhead roadway structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a black sports car driving through a covered urban arterial roadway. Red structural beams and concrete overpasses dominate the overhead space, creating a semi-enclosed environment. Various illuminated billboards including 'Set Sail' and 'Cola' advertisements line the route, casting colored reflections on the wet asphalt below.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with orbital air building

events.description: exits covered roadway into open intersection revealing the Orbital Air building and city skyline
stops at red traffic light at major intersection
accelerates from stop and proceeds through the intersection

agents.ego_description: stops at red light at major intersection beneath the Orbital Air building, then proceeds through the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: black sedan waiting at the intersection alongside the ego vehicle

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with prominent 'ORBITAL AIR' neon signage and red circular logo
vertical traffic signal showing red then changing to green
wide pedestrian crossing with white striped markings on wet asphalt
full moon visible in the night sky above the skyscrapers

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges from the covered roadway into a wide-open intersection dominated by the massive Orbital Air building on the left. The sky is now fully visible with a bright moon overhead. The car stops at a red traffic light, waiting alongside other vehicles, before accelerating through the scramble crosswalk as the light changes.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial street with elevated highways

events.description: makes right turn at intersection following the road curvature
navigates through moderate traffic passing other vehicles

agents.ego_description: navigating through city streets making turns and maneuvering around other vehicles in moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving in the adjacent lane maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: multi-level highway overpass with illuminated supports spanning across the street
neon sign with 'EL COYOTE COJO' text in red and white colors
tropical palm trees lining the sidewalk adding sparse vegetation to the urban scene

segments.scene_description: The car continues through urban streets, making a right turn and navigating moderate traffic. Elevated highway structures loom overhead while neon signs including 'El Coyote Cojo' illuminate the right side. Palm trees line the left sidewalk, and the vehicle maneuvers around a yellow taxi while passing under overpasses.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial district with holographic billboards

events.description: enters area with dense concentration of holographic advertisements and digital billboards

agents.ego_description: cruising through neon-lit commercial district with dense signage and advertisements on all sides

entered.detail: large blue neon sign with 'DATA' text in capital letters
red illuminated sign with 'kabayan' text on building facade
floating digital advertisements displaying various products and characters in 3D

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through a dense commercial corridor lined with towering holographic billboards and neon signage. A large blue 'DATA' sign and red 'kabayan' sign dominate the right side, while floating 3D advertisements fill the left. The street remains wet, reflecting the myriad of colored lights from the surrounding digital displays.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial area with gas station and convenience stores

events.description: approaches illuminated gas station with yellow canopy structure

agents.ego_description: approaching gas station and navigating through intersection with commercial buildings on both sides

entered.detail: futuristic gas station with illuminated yellow canopy and fuel pumps
large advertisement billboard visible again in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the car approaching a futuristic gas station with a distinctive yellow illuminated canopy on the right. The 'Set Sail' billboard becomes visible again in the distance ahead, suggesting a circular route through the district. The vehicle slows slightly while navigating the intersection near the gas station.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement tracking a black sports car as it transitions from a claustrophobic urban underpass into the expansive, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic city. It begins beneath heavy concrete overpasses and red structural beams, where illuminated billboards cast colorful reflections across wet asphalt. As the vehicle emerges from the covered roadway, the scene opens into a wide intersection beneath a bright moon and the massive Orbital Air building before the car accelerates through a scramble crosswalk. The camera then follows the car as it weaves through moderate traffic and under elevated highways, passing palm trees and neon signs like El Coyote Cojo. Finally, the environment shifts into a dense commercial corridor filled with towering holographic displays and floating 3D advertisements, eventually slowing as it approaches a yellow-canopied gas station.
